description.s: REPL introspection functions for runtime discoverability.
— Enumerate object properties, grouped into Functions / Namespaces / Values
— Resolve source item via kernel API detection or WeakMap provenance, show symbols with signatures and line numbers
— Show details for a specific method (signature, kind, line, navigation command)
— Cross-item symbol search across all code items, with optional kind/scope filters
for a code item, grouped by kind
